text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Now then, it's about time we begin. All together,
everyone...

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: Congrats on the fan mail, Machitan!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, thank you. Thank you. You're too kind.
Heh-heh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, Matikanetannhauser's friends have
gathered to hold a party commemorating her first
fan letter.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Please share your thoughts with us on this
momentous event.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I've been over the moon since I got it. I carry
it with me wherever I go and sleep with it beside
my pillow.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Gosh, I already think of it like a new member of
my family.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
If it's part of your family, then you have to give it
a name!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It's just a figure of speech, Turbo... No matter
how much she loves it, naming a letter is just—

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I'll call him Lettie!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: She went and did it!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Now then, Tannhauser. Everyone's been looking
forward to hearing what it says. Care to do the
honors?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I'm on it! I've already read it so many times, I can
recite it perfectly by heart!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
"Dear Matikanetannhauser,
I always watch your races."

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: "I've always been completely average at everything I do, so I tend to give up on things right away. But after I saw you run, something changed. ...Hic."

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
"Watching you do your best and give everything
you have, no matter what the race or who your
opponent, has truly moved me."

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...Sniff.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Um... Are you okay, Tannhauser?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Mm-hmm, I'm fine.
There's still a little more.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
"Please continue to face your challenges head-on
with a strong heart."
I will, Lettie. I'll do my best. Ahem.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
"I think you're extraordinary.
Matikanetannhauser, you're my biggest hero."

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...Waaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You're bawling your eyes out! I thought you said
you already read it a bunch of times?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: W-w-well, I have, but... it's just so powerful!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: It's so moving to think someone could find me special!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
A-any...w-way! I have to work extra super hard
from now on! Oh, I should write back!

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: Great idea!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taking courage from her fan,
Matikanetannhauser's determination to do her
best is freshly renewed.
